5c285a797e9609398856528a5ca6e7a59174374f: {"action": "answer", "confidence": 0.9, "sql": "SELECT c.region AS region, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM orders o LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY c.region", "title": "Total Order Quantity per Customer Region", "assumptions": ["'total order quantity' means SUM of orders.quantity", "Orders whose customer_id is null (25% of rows) have no region and are grouped under a NULL region", "Joined orders to customers via the inferred optional FK using a LEFT JOIN"], "lineage": ["orders.csv.quantity", "orders.csv.customer_id", "customers.csv.customer_id", "customers.csv.region"], "clarification": null, "reason": null}
